title: Roasted Pumpkin Pasta
description: A cosy roasted pumpkin pasta with sage, parmesan and a silky sauce.
method: Toss the pumpkin with one tablespoon of olive oil, salt and pepper. Roast for 30 minutes or until soft and caramelised.
Cook the pasta according to the packet directions, reserving one cup of pasta water.
Heat the remaining oil in a frying pan. Add the garlic and sage and cook until fragrant.
Mash half of the pumpkin, then stir it into the pan with the cream and a splash of pasta water.
Add the pasta, remaining pumpkin and parmesan. Toss until glossy and well coated.
notes: Add toasted walnuts or crispy pancetta for extra texture.
